Server Wipe
Full Server Wipe

Resets ALL player profiles to fresh state. Keeps account credentials and session IDs. A safety backup is created automatically before wiping.

This action cannot be undone (except by restoring a backup). Server restart required after wipe.
Type WIPE to confirm:
Selective Wipe

Wipe only selected categories across all profiles. A safety backup is created first.

Type WIPE to confirm:

Backup Diff —

Warning: Restoring will overwrite all current profiles with the backup data. A safety backup of current profiles will be created first. Server restart required after restore.

Stop Server

Stopping the server will shut it down completely. The dashboard, all game connections, and any active raids will be terminated immediately.

The server will not restart automatically. Only the server host can bring it back online by starting it manually from the Watchdog or machine console.

Send Broadcast

Send a system message to all registered profiles.

Attach Items
Changes apply to all players on the server. Click "Apply & Regenerate" to activate.
How Modifiers Work
Global Multiplier — Base multiplier applied to all flea market buy prices.
Category Multiplier — Stacks multiplicatively with Global. E.g. 2× Global × 3× Category = 6× final price. Leave at 1.0× for no additional change.
Per-Item Override — Replaces all other modifiers. The item uses only the override value.
Tax Multiplier — Scales flea market listing tax. 0 = free listings, 1 = normal, 2 = double tax. Players must restart their game client for tax changes to take effect.
Price Formula: Final Price = Base Price × Global × Category
Exception: Items with a Per-Item Override use only that value
Economy Tip: Use tax multiplier to balance player income — higher tax discourages flea selling, lower tax encourages it

Preset Preview

Compare Items

Changes apply to all players. These settings take effect immediately on Apply — no server restart needed.
Found in Raid Toggles
Flea Market Purchases → FIR
Items bought on the flea market will arrive marked as Found in Raid. Useful for enforcing FIR-only gameplay while still allowing flea use.
Trader Purchases → FIR
Items bought from any trader (vanilla + modded) will arrive marked as Found in Raid. Combines well with quest FIR removal.
Barters Require Functional Items
Non-currency barter items at all traders must be in functional (undamaged) condition. Currency-only purchases (rubles, USD, EUR) are unaffected.
Hideout Construction Requires FIR Items
All item requirements for hideout module construction must be Found in Raid. Items purchased from traders or the flea will not count.
Barter Items Must Be FIR
Non-currency items used in trader barters must be Found in Raid. Currency payments (rubles, USD, EUR) are exempt. Server blocks the trade if any barter item isn't FIR.
Selling to Traders Requires FIR Items
Items sold to any trader must be Found in Raid. Non-FIR items (purchased from traders/flea, transferred, etc.) cannot be sold back. Server blocks the sale if any item isn't FIR.
Economy Controls
Non-FIR Sell Penalty
Reduce sell price when selling non-FIR items to traders. Only active when "Selling Requires FIR" is OFF. Client shows full price but server pays the penalized amount.
0%
Purchase Quantity Limits
Cap how many of each item a player can buy per trader reset cycle. Uses SPT's built-in buy restriction system. Existing tighter limits are preserved.
Limit: per item per reset
Secure Container Wipe on Death
On PMC death, lose all items inside your secure container except keys and cases (and their contents). Keycards, mechanical keys, keytool, docs case, SICC, etc. are all preserved.
Death Tax
Lose a percentage of stash rubles when dying in a PMC raid (killed, MIA, or run-through). Scav raids and survived extracts are unaffected. Set to 0% to disable.
0%
Global Gameplay Toggles
Unlimited Trader Stock
All traders have unlimited item stock. Items never sell out regardless of how many players buy them. Requires client restart to take effect.
Unlock All Loyalty Levels
All traders are at max loyalty level for all players, regardless of level, reputation, or money spent. Requires client restart.
Disable Discard Limits
Remove in-raid item discard limits. Normally some items can only be discarded a limited number of times per raid — this removes that restriction. Requires client restart.
Disable Skill Decay
Prevent skills from decaying over time when not used. Skills will only go up, never down. Requires client restart.
Tiered Flea Market
Enable level-gated flea market where items unlock at specific player levels. Higher-tier items (armor, ammo, weapons) require higher levels to list and buy.
Lost on Death
Control which equipment slots are lost when dying in raid. Checked = LOST, Unchecked = KEPT. Enable the master toggle to override server defaults.
Quest handover FIR is controlled in the Quests tab → Global Settings → "Remove Found-in-Raid requirements". Unchecking that toggle enforces FIR for quest item handovers.
